artifact: Computes percentage of cards in Chinese Simplified.
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(id) AS percentage FROM cards;

raw_response.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(id) AS percentage FROM cards;
raw_response.artifact: Computes percentage of cards in Chinese Simplified.
